UpdatePermissionGroupRules.agName: Name of the permission group whose rules are being updated.
UpdatePermissionGroupRules.arId: Identifier of the rule to update.
UpdatePermissionGroupRules.ip: Authorized IP address (virtual VPC IP); supports single IP or CIDR range (with mask); supports IPv4 and IPv6, e.g. 10.10.1.123 or 2001::/16.
UpdatePermissionGroupRules.mask: Used with ip to define a subnet; set to 32 for a single IPv4 address or 128 for a single IPv6 address.
UpdatePermissionGroupRules.writeAccess: Read/write rule; "read_only" for read-only access, "read_write" for read-write access.
UpdatePermissionGroupRules.userAccess: User permission rule; "no_squash" allows root access, "root_squash" restricts root, "all_squash" restricts all users.
UpdatePermissionGroupRules.priority: Rule priority; range 1–100, where 1 is the highest priority.
